metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the ride-sharing-marketplace domain.

bricks.name: Trip Request and Intent Capture
bricks.description: Captures rider pickup, destination, timing, ride type, account context, and trip intent before dispatch begins.

internalModules.title: Request Capture and Validation
internalModules.description: Validates trip inputs, eligibility, and account context.

internalModules.title: Product Selection Logic
internalModules.description: Determines which ride products and variants are offered for the requested trip.

internalModules.title: Request State Management
internalModules.description: Stores request lifecycle state before, during, and after dispatch.

interfaces.title: Trip Request API
interfaces.description: API for creating and updating ride requests.

interfaces.title: Request UX Surface
interfaces.description: Rider-facing request flow in mobile surfaces.

interfaces.title: Request Events
interfaces.description: Event stream for request creation, update, and cancellation.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Dynamic Pricing and Incentives for upfront fare and offer packaging.
Depends on Rider Identity, Wallet and Payments for account, wallet, and billing context.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Supports address normalization and pickup or destination interpretation.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Rider clients depend on request capture to start trips.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Customer Profile.
Writes or updates Customer Contact Point during domain workflows.
Reads Consent Record to support domain workflows.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Trip Request And Intent Capture.

bricks.name: ETA, Maps and Routing Intelligence
bricks.description: Provides route estimation, pickup guidance, airport geofencing, and live map context for riders and drivers.

internalModules.title: ETA Prediction Models
internalModules.description: Predicts pickup and trip arrival timing.

internalModules.title: Pickup and Drop-off Guidance
internalModules.description: Optimizes exact meeting points and constrained-zone handoffs.

internalModules.title: Geofence and Zone Rules
internalModules.description: Maintains airport, venue, and city-specific navigation constraints.

interfaces.title: ETA and Routing API
interfaces.description: Returns routes, ETAs, and pickup guidance.

interfaces.title: Live Location Events
interfaces.description: Emits location and route progress events.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Provides road network, traffic, and geospatial context.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Eta Maps And Routing Intelligence.
Reads Rider Identity Wallet And Payments to support domain workflows.
Reads Driver Onboarding And Compliance to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Rider Identity, Wallet and Payments
bricks.description: Manages rider identity, family or business profiles, payment methods, receipts, refunds, and billing context.

internalModules.title: Identity and Account Graph
internalModules.description: Stores rider, family, and business profile relationships.

internalModules.title: Wallet and Billing Controls
internalModules.description: Manages payment instruments, billing preferences, and receipts.

internalModules.title: Receipts and Adjustments
internalModules.description: Supports refunds, credits, and post-trip billing corrections.

interfaces.title: Identity and Billing API
interfaces.description: API for profile, payment, and receipt workflows.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Handles charge authorization, settlement, and refund execution.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Identity Credential to support domain workflows.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Session Token.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Access Policy.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.

bricks.name: Driver Onboarding and Compliance
bricks.description: Supports driver signup, screening, document verification, and eligibility management across markets.

internalModules.title: Driver Profile and Status Model
internalModules.description: Tracks account state, eligibility, and market permissions.

internalModules.title: Document and Screening Workflow
internalModules.description: Processes licenses, vehicle documents, and background checks.

internalModules.title: Compliance Rules Engine
internalModules.description: Applies local legal and policy requirements to driver status.

interfaces.title: Driver Eligibility API
interfaces.description: Returns account and vehicle eligibility decisions.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Safety and Trust Operations for identity and trust signals.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Customer Contact Point to support domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Driver Onboarding And Compliance.

bricks.name: Driver Earnings and Incentive Management
bricks.description: Calculates and explains driver earnings, incentives, adjustments, cash-out, and payout visibility.

internalModules.title: Fare Breakdown Calculator
internalModules.description: Converts trip activity into driver-visible earnings statements.

internalModules.title: Incentive Ledger
internalModules.description: Stores bonus, quest, and other incentive state.

internalModules.title: Payout and Cash-out Controls
internalModules.description: Handles payout timing and cash-out workflow control.

interfaces.title: Earnings API
interfaces.description: API for driver-facing earnings views and payout actions.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Dynamic Pricing and Incentives for fare and incentive logic.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Payment Instrument Reference to support domain workflows.
Writes or updates Transaction during domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Reads Dynamic Pricing And Incentives to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Business and Fleet Controls
bricks.description: Manages business travel policies, fleet accounts, supplier setup, reporting access, and account-level operational controls.

internalModules.title: Account and Policy Model
internalModules.description: Stores business, fleet, billing, and traveler or supplier rules.

internalModules.title: Admin Workflow Services
internalModules.description: Runs setup, assignment, and governance tasks for admins and supplier operators.

internalModules.title: Reporting and Export Controls
internalModules.description: Controls access to reporting, invoice, and reconciliation workflows.

interfaces.title: Admin API
interfaces.description: API for business and fleet account controls.

interfaces.title: Admin Console
interfaces.description: Web surface for program and supplier administration.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Rider Identity, Wallet and Payments for billing and receipt context.
Depends on Marketplace Intelligence and Analytics for reporting views.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Identity Credential to support domain workflows.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Session Token.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Access Policy.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.

bricks.name: Dispatch and Matching Engine
bricks.description: Matches rider demand to the best available driver or fleet supply while honoring geography, product rules, and trip quality constraints.

internalModules.title: Real-time Supply Selector
internalModules.description: Chooses candidate drivers or fleet supply for each request.

internalModules.title: Rematch and Cancellation Logic
internalModules.description: Handles driver declines, rider cancellations, and rematch conditions.

internalModules.title: Liquidity and Queue Controls
internalModules.description: Balances supply and demand in constrained environments such as airports.

interfaces.title: Dispatch Decision API
interfaces.description: API for dispatching and rematching trips.

interfaces.title: Supply Offer Feed
interfaces.description: Driver-facing offer and assignment event stream.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on ETA, Maps and Routing Intelligence to evaluate pickup feasibility and time.
Depends on Dynamic Pricing and Incentives for supply-demand balancing signals.
Depends on Reserve, Share and Airport Orchestration for special flow handling.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Driver clients depend on dispatch offers and trip assignment updates.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Dispatch And Matching.
Reads Trip Request And Intent Capture to support domain workflows.
Reads Rider Identity Wallet And Payments to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Dynamic Pricing and Incentives
bricks.description: Calculates upfront fares, surge multipliers, discounts, and driver incentives based on demand, supply, market rules, and product type.

internalModules.title: Quote and Fare Engine
internalModules.description: Calculates rider-facing pricing and fee composition.

internalModules.title: Incentive and Surge Logic
internalModules.description: Adjusts driver and rider economics based on marketplace conditions.

internalModules.title: Experimentation and Guardrails
internalModules.description: Applies pricing experiments and policy limits without losing operator control.

interfaces.title: Quote API
interfaces.description: Returns fares, expected wait, and available product options.

interfaces.title: Marketplace Pricing Events
interfaces.description: Broadcasts pricing and incentive state changes.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Marketplace Intelligence and Analytics for demand and conversion feedback.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Dynamic Pricing And Incentives.
Reads Driver Onboarding And Compliance to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Reserve, Share and Airport Orchestration
bricks.description: Handles scheduled trips, shared-ride routing logic, and constrained pickup or drop-off operations such as airports and shuttles.

internalModules.title: Scheduled Trip Planner
internalModules.description: Manages future trips, supply reservation, and pre-trip reminders.

internalModules.title: Shared Ride Orchestrator
internalModules.description: Coordinates pooled routing, rider sequencing, and detour controls.

internalModules.title: Airport and Venue Operations Rules
internalModules.description: Applies pickup-lane, queue, and access logic for constrained environments.

interfaces.title: Special Trip Rules API
interfaces.description: Returns reserve, pooling, and location-specific operating rules.

interfaces.title: Operations Workspace
interfaces.description: Operator interface for constrained trip flows and scheduling controls.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Dispatch and Matching Engine to allocate supply to special trip flows.
Depends on ETA, Maps and Routing Intelligence for scheduling and pooled routing logic.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Provides local operating constraints, queue rules, and pickup-zone definitions.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Trip Request And Intent Capture to support domain workflows.
Reads Eta Maps And Routing Intelligence to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Safety and Trust Operations
bricks.description: Provides identity assurance, trip safety tooling, trust controls, incident workflows, and abuse or fraud prevention.

internalModules.title: Identity and Verification Controls
internalModules.description: Supports driver identity, PIN verification, and risk controls.

internalModules.title: On-trip Safety Toolkit
internalModules.description: Exposes emergency, tracking, and incident-help features.

internalModules.title: Incident and Trust Workflow Engine
internalModules.description: Routes support, fraud, and safety events into operational case handling.

interfaces.title: Safety Toolkit API
interfaces.description: API for rider and driver safety features.

interfaces.title: Trust Operations Workspace
interfaces.description: Operator interface for incident and trust workflows.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Supports live safety escalation and emergency workflows.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Identity Credential to support domain workflows.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Session Token.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Access Policy.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.

bricks.name: Marketplace Intelligence and Analytics
bricks.description: Provides KPI models, marketplace health monitoring, experimentation feedback, and business reporting across rider, driver, fleet, and trust workflows.

internalModules.title: Operational Data Model
internalModules.description: Normalizes requests, trips, driver activity, and support signals into reusable facts.

internalModules.title: KPI and Reporting Layer
internalModules.description: Publishes business, customer, and operational KPIs for teams and leaders.

internalModules.title: Experiment and Quality Analytics
internalModules.description: Measures the impact of changes to dispatch, pricing, and trust workflows.

interfaces.title: Reporting Feed
interfaces.description: Data interface for dashboards and operational reporting.

interfaces.title: Analytics API
interfaces.description: API for aggregated metrics and intelligence views.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Business And Fleet Controls to support domain workflows.
Reads Eta Maps And Routing Intelligence to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Partner API and Integration Exchange
bricks.description: Supports enterprise reporting, supplier integration, partner onboarding, and future external mobility or autonomy interfaces.

internalModules.title: Partner Authentication and Contracts
internalModules.description: Manages partner access, versioning, and technical contracts.

internalModules.title: Integration Workflow Handlers
internalModules.description: Connects reporting, provisioning, and event exchange with partners.

interfaces.title: Partner API Gateway
interfaces.description: Controlled API gateway for enterprise and partner access.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Business and Fleet Controls for partner-facing setup and account management.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Customer Contact Point to support domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Reads Driver Onboarding And Compliance to support domain workflows.
